---
title: "Tutorial for using `hydroPSO` to calibrate the `CemaNeige-GR6J` model"
author: 
- "Mauricio Zambrano-Bigiarini"
date: "v0.2, May 25th, 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: 
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: yes
  html_document: 
    number_sections: true
urlcolor: blue
subtitle: 'Study area: Trancura River Basin, Chile'
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Tutorial for using `hydroPSO` to calibrate the `CemaNeige-GR6J` hydrological model`}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

A detailed tutorial on using `hydroPSO` to calibrate `CemaNeige-GR6J` is available at [https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20387185](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20387185).
